_doc: Single source of truth for BOTH moneyline decision engines: the live JS engine (src/mlb.js valueSafetyReasons / applyMoneylineValueMarket) and the offline Python engine (src/quality_control.py apply_confidence_downgrade). Two interpreters read this file: src/rule_engine.js and src/rule_engine.py. INVARIANTS: (1) Rules are evaluated in ascending `order`, which mirrors the ORIGINAL source line sequence so reason/adjustment output stays byte-identical; `tier` is descriptive metadata per the README input-signal taxonomy (Tier1 pitcher/offense/bullpen/park/odds; Tier2 weather/lineup/form; Tier3 umpire/public/H2H) and does NOT affect evaluation order. (2) Predicate logic lives in per-language handlers (the `handler` key names the function); thresholds, messages, ordering, scope and tier live ONLY here. (3) Every rule's `handler` must exist in the registry of each engine it is scoped to, and every registered handler must be referenced by a rule (schema tests enforce both directions). (4) Numeric formatting stays in the handlers because JS (.toFixed) and Python (:.0f) format differently. Changing any id/engines/tier/order/action/message must keep both schema tests and both parity suites green.

config_refs.js_edge_threshold: config.minimumMoneylineEdge (src/config.js) -> moneylineValueEdgeThreshold() in src/mlb.js; default 0.04 (scaled to percent)

rules.notes: Fires when moneylineOddsFreshnessReason(item) is non-empty. Handler returns that pre-built string as an override (either 'odds moneyline timestamp tidak tersedia' or 'odds moneyline stale {n}m > {max}m').
option.edge < edgeThreshold. edgeThreshold = moneylineValueEdgeThreshold() (configurable), passed in via ctx.edgeThreshold.
pickedTeamWinPct < min_win_pct. pct = (winPct*100).toFixed(0); floor = (min_win_pct*100).toFixed(0).
option.side === 'away' && Number(option.odds) > max_odds.

rules.message: pick berlawanan dengan model favored side
rules.notes: option.side !== ctx.modelFavoredSide (computed in host from pureModelProbabilityForSide).
option.modelProbability < min_probability. prob = modelProbability.toFixed(1); floor renders as String(min_probability) == '52' to match template-literal ${MIN_VALUE_PROBABILITY}.

rules.message: sharp money contra: line moved {magnitude} cents against pick
rules.notes: item.modelBreakdown.sharpMoney.direction === 'against_model' && magnitude >= min_magnitude.

rules.message: record/H2H lebih dominan daripada matchup hari ini
rules.notes: recordDominated || (recordContextEdge > matchupEdge*record_multiplier && matchupEdge < max_matchup_edge).

Only when the evolution rule is active (getEvolutionRule). Reads its .parameters (record_context_multiplier, max_matchup_edge) with the defaults above. Pushed as a reason AND surfaced in auditAdjustments by the host string-match on 'audit guardrail'.

rules.message: matchup edge game ini masih tipis
rules.notes: abs(matchupEdge) < max_matchup_edge && option.edge < strong_edge (hardcoded STRONG_VALUE_EDGE_THRESHOLD, NOT the configurable edge floor).

rules.message: kurang dari 3 faktor model setuju dengan pick ini
rules.notes: factorsAgreeing < min_agreeing && option.edge < strong_edge. factorsAgreeing = count of [matchup,starter,offense,bullpen,lineup]Edge * pickDir > agree_threshold.

rules.message: audit guardrail: edge model/value masih lemah
rules.notes: Only when the evolution rule is active. (option.edge < max_value_edge || modelProbabilityEdge < max_probability_edge) && matchupEdge < max_matchup_edge. modelProbabilityEdge = abs(modelProbability - 50).
some lineup not confirmed or count < min_count, AND option.edge < strong_edge.

rules.message: opener/bulk pitcher membuat SP signal tidak bersih
rules.notes: some team openerSituation.isOpener with confidence in `confidences`.
(!item.away.starter || !item.home.starter) && option.edge < strong_edge.
quality_report.probable_pitchers == MISSING.
'opener_situation' in quality_report.no_bet_considerations. Adjustment note only; does NOT set no_bet or change confidence.
edge_value is None. First branch of the edge if/elif; mutually exclusive with yrfi/edge_floor.
edge_value is not None && market_type == 'yrfi' && abs(edge_value) < threshold.
edge_value is not None && market_type != 'yrfi' && abs(edge_value) < threshold. threshold = _moneyline_edge_threshold() passed via ctx. threshold_pct = f'{threshold*100:.0f}%'.
int(quality_report.score) < min_score.

ctx.sharp_adj: 'downgrade_two' -> two _downgrade + 'sharp money strongly against pick: confidence downgraded x2'; 'downgrade_one' -> one _downgrade + 'sharp money against pick: confidence downgraded'. Always appends when it fires.
quality_report.odds == STALE. One _downgrade; always appends the message.
quality_report.weather == STALE && quality_report.weather_outdoor. One _downgrade; always appends.

rules.message: lineup not confirmed: confidence capped at Medium
rules.notes: quality_report.lineup in {PROJECTED, MISSING}. _cap_confidence(conf,'Medium'); append ONLY if it changed.

rules.message: probable pitcher projected: confidence capped at Medium
rules.notes: quality_report.probable_pitchers == PROJECTED. _cap_confidence(conf,'Medium'); append ONLY if it changed.

bands.message: data quality 60-74: confidence capped at Low
data quality 75-84: confidence capped at Medium
calibration does not support High: confidence capped at Medium

rules.notes: elif chain on score. 60-74 cap Low (append if changed); 75-84 cap Medium (append if changed); 85+ ONLY when confidence=='High' && !calibration_supports_high -> set Medium + append. At most one band applies (ranges disjoint).
